name: new-tab-bookmarks
description: Shows a list of bookmarks in the New Tab view.
author: KraXen72 <dpelech1@gmail.com>

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.watcher: ls main.js manifest.json styles.css | entr cp main.js manifest.json styles.css /media/win/#blackhole/.obsidian/plugins/new-tab-bookmarks/
